Interface OpenRpc14Extensible

All Superinterfaces:
Extensible, OpenRpc1xExtensible, OpenRpcExtensible
All Known Subinterfaces:
OpenRpc14Components, OpenRpc14Contact, OpenRpc14ContentDescriptor, OpenRpc14Document, OpenRpc14Example, OpenRpc14ExamplePairing, OpenRpc14ExternalDocumentation, OpenRpc14Info, OpenRpc14License, OpenRpc14Link, OpenRpc14Method, OpenRpc14Schema, OpenRpc14Server, OpenRpc14ServerVariable, OpenRpc14Tag
All Known Implementing Classes:
OpenRpc14ComponentsImpl, OpenRpc14ContactImpl, OpenRpc14ContentDescriptorImpl, OpenRpc14DocumentImpl, OpenRpc14ExampleImpl, OpenRpc14ExamplePairingImpl, OpenRpc14ExternalDocumentationImpl, OpenRpc14InfoImpl, OpenRpc14LicenseImpl, OpenRpc14LinkImpl, OpenRpc14MethodImpl, OpenRpc14SchemaImpl, OpenRpc14ServerImpl, OpenRpc14ServerVariableImpl, OpenRpc14TagImpl
